channel.title: Tooling on Ex Ungue Leonem | The Lion´s Lair
channel.description: Recent content in Tooling on Ex Ungue Leonem | The Lion´s Lair

item.title: EDA Internship Series #1 - From Tools to Systems
item.description: Context During my internship at AC3E /Synopsys, I was exposed to EDA tools and workflows focused on analog layout Problem A recurring issue was the friction in the development environment: Dependency on unstable servers Lack of structured tooling Implicit knowledge required to operate tools Approach Instead of focusing only on circuit design, i explored how to reduce friction in the sorrounding system: -reproducible EDA workstation -CLI-based tooling -structured documentation Takeaways EDA workflows are not only about tools, but about the systems that enable their effective use.
